projectDescription: Dot-grid loading animations for React with 36 patterns and 20 color variants
keyFeatures: 36 named dot-grid animation patterns (solo, lines, corners, shapes, waves, spiral)
20 built-in color variants with customizable glow effects
Flexible grid system with configurable rows, columns, and scale
Wave and sequence animation modes with directional control
Tiny bundle size with zero dependencies
TypeScript support with full type definitions
publicApiSurface: Lumidot - Main React component for dot-grid loading animations
LumidotProps - TypeScript interface for component props
LumidotVariant - Type for color variants (20 colors)
LumidotPattern - Type for animation patterns (36 patterns)
LumidotDirection - Type for wave direction (ltr, rtl, ttb, btt)
PATTERN_NAMES - Constant array of all available pattern names
COLORS - Constant object mapping variant names to hex colors
SYNC_PATTERNS - Set of patterns using synchronized animation
WAVE_DIRECTIONS - Mapping of wave pattern names to directions
